mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, object_key, operation, user_id, user_shard, client_ip, device_id, user_agent, file_size, result_status, error_message, start_time, end_time, duration_ms, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM file_access_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM file_access_log WHERE operation = #{operation} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM file_access_log WHERE result_status = #{resultStatus} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM file_access_log WHERE start_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT FROM file_access_log ORDER BY start_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO file_access_log ( bucket_name, object_key, operation, user_id, user_shard, client_ip, device_id, user_agent, file_size, result_status, error_message, start_time, end_time, duration_ms ) VALUES
(#{item.bucketName}, #{item.objectKey}, #{item.operation}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userShard}, #{item.clientIp}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.resultStatus}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.durationMs})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM file_access_log WHERE created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_access_log WHERE operation = #{operation} AND created_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM file_access_log WHERE start_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND result_status = 'SUCCESS'
